candidate_scandal_rationale: Explicit candidate-liability adjustment for Graham Platner. Set at -1.0 rather than -2.0 because Maine now has a dense recent polling record, so some liability/scandal effect is likely reflected in the polling layer. Reassess as additional credible Maine polling accumulates.
